What does the linearity property of the Laplace transform state?
op: The Laplace transform of a product of functions is equal to the product of the Laplace transforms of each function individually.
The Laplace transform of a composition of functions is equal to the composition of the Laplace transforms of each function individually.
The Laplace transform of a division of functions is equal to the division of the Laplace transforms of each function individually.
The Laplace transform of a sum of functions is equal to the sum of the Laplace transforms of each function individually.
